'''Kahr'corvh''' [[Clan Kihm'bar]] was the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] representative to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Kahr'corvh was a signatory of ''[[Why Do We Fight the Empire?]]'', the New Republic's affirmation of their resolve to fight the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
